features.name: GitHub Integration
features.description: Read repos, search code, manage issues and PRs via MCP

features.name: Obsidian Knowledge Base
features.description: Sync session notes and project memory to an Obsidian vault

features.name: Google Drive
features.description: Read and write files in Google Drive via OAuth

features.name: You.com Web Search
features.description: Web search via You.com (free tier: 100/day, no key required)

features.name: Brave Search
features.description: Alternative web search via Brave (2000 free searches/month)

features.name: ElevenLabs Text-to-Speech
features.description: AI voice narration for onboarding tour and session playback

features.name: DeepSeek Routines
features.description: Use DeepSeek as an alternative model for scheduled routines

features.name: Support Tickets
features.description: In-app bug report and feature request submission via Brevo email

features.name: Brevo Email MCP
features.description: Send transactional email via Brevo API through MCP

features.name: Firebase Backend
features.description: Firestore, Firebase Auth, and cloud hosting integration

features.name: Aesop Course Creator
features.description: Aesop Academy course authoring tools and panel

secrets.name: Anthropic API Key
secrets.description: Required for direct Claude API access and agent sessions

secrets.name: OpenRouter API Key
secrets.description: Primary model routing — required for multi-model agent support

secrets.name: OpenAI API Key
secrets.description: Optional — enables GPT-4o and other OpenAI models via OpenRouter

secrets.name: DeepSeek API Key
secrets.description: Optional — enables DeepSeek models for routines and agents

secrets.name: ElevenLabs API Key
secrets.description: Optional — enables AI voice narration in the onboarding tour

secrets.name: Brave Search API Key
secrets.description: Optional — enables Brave web search (2000 free searches/month)

secrets.name: Brevo Email API Key
secrets.description: Optional — users provide their own Brevo account for email features

secrets.name: Google OAuth Client
secrets.description: Optional — users provide their own Google OAuth client for Drive integration

secrets.name: Firebase Service Account
secrets.description: Optional — users provide their own Firebase project credentials
